briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_CfgInitialize - Initialize the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes an XV_vscaler instance using the provided configuration structure and effective base address. It sets up the instance configuration, assigns the base address, and marks the driver as ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance to initialize.
Pointer to the configuration structure.
Physical base address of the device.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Start - Start the v_vscaler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the ap_start bit in the control register to start the hardware. It preserves the auto-restart bit (bit 7) if it was previously set. The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the driver is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_IsDone - Check if the v_vscaler hardware has finished processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register and checks the ap_done bit (bit 1) to determine if the hardware has completed its operation. It asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the driver is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware is done, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_IsIdle - Check if the v_vscaler hardware is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register and checks the ap_idle bit (bit 2) to determine if the hardware is currently idle. It asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the driver is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_IsReady - Check if the v_vscaler hardware is ready for new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register and checks the ap_start bit (bit 0) to determine if the hardware is ready to accept new input. It asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the driver is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware is ready for new input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_EnableAutoRestart - Enable auto-restart for the v_vscaler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the auto-restart bit (bit 7) in the control register, enabling the hardware to automatically restart after completing its current operation. It asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the driver is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_DisableAutoRestart - Disables the auto-restart feature of the V-Scaler hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before writing to the control register to disable auto-restart. After calling this function, the V-Scaler hardware will not automatically restart its operation after completing a task, and must be manually started if further processing is required.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance to operate on. Must not be NULL and must point to an initialized and ready XV_vscaler structure.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Set_HwReg_HeightIn - Sets the input height hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified input height value to the hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.
The input height value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_HeightIn - Retrieves the input height value from the hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the input height hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the input height hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Set_HwReg_Width - Sets the hardware register width for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.
The width value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_Width - Retrieves the width value from the hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the width hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the width hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Set_HwReg_HeightOut - Sets the output height hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified output height value to the hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.
The output height value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_HeightOut - Retrieves the output height value from the hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the output height hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the output height hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Set_HwReg_LineRate - Sets the line rate hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified line rate value to the hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.
The line rate value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_LineRate - Retrieves the line rate value from the hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the line rate hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the line rate hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Set_HwReg_ColorMode - Sets the hardware register for color mode in the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified color mode data to the hardware register associated with the XV_vscaler instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
The color mode data to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current color mode hardware register value from the V-Scaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the color mode register from the hardware using the base address specified in the instance configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. It must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: The value of the color mode hardware register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_vfltCoeff_BaseAddress - Get the base address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the base address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register by adding the base address from the instance configuration to the defined offset for the vertical filter coefficient register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The base address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_vfltCoeff_HighAddress - Get the high address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the high address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register by adding the base address from the instance configuration to the defined high offset for the vertical filter coefficient register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The high address of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the total number of bytes for the vertical filter coefficient hardware register in the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function calculates the total byte size by subtracting the base address of the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register from its high address and adding one, which gives the total addressable bytes for the coefficient register block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. It must be a valid pointer and the instance must be ready.

simplesect.para: The total number of bytes allocated for the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register block.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_vfltCoeff_BitWidth - Retrieves the bit width of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the bit width of the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register as defined by the XV_VSCALER_CTRL_WIDTH_HWREG_VFLTCOEFF macro. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before returning the bit width.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The bit width of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Get_HwReg_vfltCoeff_Depth - Retrieves the depth of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the depth of the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register as defined by the XV_VSCALER_CTRL_DEPTH_HWREG_VFLTCOEFF macro. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before returning the depth value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The depth of the vertical filter coefficient hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Write_HwReg_vfltCoeff_Words - Writes an array of 32-bit words to the vertical filter coefficient hardware register of the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified number of 32-bit words from the provided data array to the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register block, starting at the given offset. It first checks that the instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. The function also ensures that the write operation does not exceed the bounds of the register block. If the operation is valid, it writes each word sequentially.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Offset (in words) from the base of the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register block where writing begins.
Pointer to the array of 32-bit words to write.
Number of 32-bit words to write.

simplesect.para: The number of words written if successful, or 0 if the operation would exceed the register block bounds.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Read_HwReg_vfltCoeff_Words - Reads an array of 32-bit words from the vertical filter coefficient hardware register of the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the specified number of 32-bit words from the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register block, starting at the given offset, and stores them in the provided data array. It first checks that the instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. The function also ensures that the read operation does not exceed the bounds of the register block. If the operation is valid, it reads each word sequentially.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Offset (in words) from the base of the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register block where reading begins.
Pointer to the array where the read 32-bit words will be stored.
Number of 32-bit words to read.

simplesect.para: The number of words read if successful, or 0 if the operation would exceed the register block bounds.

briefdescription.para: This Function Writes a sequence of bytes to the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register of the XV_vscaler hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes 'length' bytes from the buffer pointed to by 'data' into the hardware register starting at the specified 'offset'. It ensures that the write operation does not exceed the register's address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.
Offset from the base address of HWREG_VFLTCOEFF where writing starts.
Pointer to the data buffer containing bytes to write.
Number of bytes to write from the data buffer.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written on success, or 0 if the operation would exceed the register's address range.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Read_HwReg_vfltCoeff_Bytes - Reads a sequence of bytes from the HWREG_VFLTCOEFF register of the XV_vscaler hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads 'length' bytes from the hardware register starting at the specified 'offset' and stores them in the buffer pointed to by 'data'. It ensures that the read operation does not exceed the register's address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Offset from the base address of HWREG_VFLTCOEFF where reading starts.
Pointer to the data buffer where read bytes will be stored.
Number of bytes to read from the hardware register.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read on success, or 0 if the operation would exceed the register's address range.

briefdescription.para: Enables the global interrupt for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then writes to the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register to enable global interrupts for the scaler hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vscaler instance for which the global interrupt should be enabled. The instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptGlobalDisable - Disables the global interrupt for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then writes to the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register to disable global interrupts for the scaler hardware.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance for which the global interrupt should be disabled. The instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptEnable - Enables specific interrupts for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the XV_vscaler hardware instance. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. The function reads the current interrupt enable register, sets the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Bitmask specifying which interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptDisable - Disables specific interrupts for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the XV_vscaler hardware instance. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. The function reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Bitmask specifying which interrupts to disable.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptClear - Clears specific interrupts for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the XV_vscaler hardware instance. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before writing to the interrupt status register to clear the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vscaler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized and ready.
Bitmask specifying which interrupts to clear.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptGetEnabled - Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before reading the interrupt enable register from the hardware. The value returned indicates which interrupts are currently enabled for the scaler hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The contents of the interrupt enable register, indicating the enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_InterruptGetStatus - Retrieves the interrupt status for the given XV_vscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before reading the interrupt status register from the hardware. The status is read from the ISR (Interrupt Status Register) at the base address specified in the configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vscaler instance.

simplesect.para: The current value of the interrupt status register.
